# Blue By Art Shop — Complete Reference

> Blue By Art Shop offers monthly kids art subscriptions plus one-time art kits for ages 5–12.

---

## Core URLs

- Homepage: https://bluebyartshop.com
- Shop: https://bluebyartshop.com/shop
- Subscribe: https://bluebyartshop.com/subscribe
- About: https://bluebyartshop.com/about
- Contact: https://bluebyartshop.com/contact
- Privacy: https://bluebyartshop.com/privacy
- Terms: https://bluebyartshop.com/terms
- Shipping & Returns: https://bluebyartshop.com/shipping-returns
- JSON context endpoint: https://bluebyartshop.com/api/llms-context

---

## Subscription Plans

### Mini Artist — $19.99/month (Ages 5–7)
- 2 plaster figures OR 10 coloring pages
- 6 paint pots or colored pencils
- 1 brush or pencil
- Step-by-step instructions
- Sticker sheet

### Creative Explorer — $29.99/month (Ages 5–12)
- 3 plaster figures OR 20 coloring pages
- 12 paint pots or color set
- Full brush set
- Sealant + activity card
- 1 digital banner template
- 1 mini 3D print figure

### Master Creator — $44.99/month (Ages 5–12)
- 4 plaster figures OR 30 coloring pages
- 18 paint pots + metallics + full color set
- Premium brush set
- Sealant + activity card
- Digital banner template
- Illustrated storybook
- Display stand + resell kit

---

## Product Categories

- Plaster kits
- Coloring books
- 3D figure projects
- Party kits
- Wholesale bundles

The one-time catalog is available at https://bluebyartshop.com/shop and includes 16 listed products across those categories.

---

## Account and Checkout Notes

- Account access uses email magic links.
- Subscription checkout uses Stripe-hosted checkout.
- Billing can be managed from the account dashboard and Stripe billing portal when enabled for the environment.
- Lead and contact forms write to the site backend rather than using placeholder front-end success states.

---

## Support Contacts

- General support: hello@bluebyartshop.com
- Wholesale support: wholesale@bluebyartshop.com

---

## Shipping and Returns

- The site is currently set up for United States fulfillment.
- Orders are generally prepared after successful payment.
- The shipping and returns policy lives at https://bluebyartshop.com/shipping-returns.
- Delivery timing can vary by carrier, destination, and season.

---

## Brand Summary

Blue By Art Shop focuses on hands-on art kits and subscription-based creative activities for kids. The public site currently emphasizes:

- project-based art time for ages 5–12
- recurring monthly subscription plans
- one-time kits for gifting, parties, and wholesale
- account-based billing and support flows
